task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the ConfigMaps section in the Rancher UI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher web interface is visible with the 'ConfigMaps' page or menu item actively selected.

task_completion.description: The agent selected or filtered by the 'monitoring' namespace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A namespace filter, dropdown, or header shows 'monitoring' is selected, or the ConfigMaps list is explicitly scoped to the 'monitoring' namespace.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the 'monitoring-config' ConfigMap for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI shows the details or edit screen specifically for the ConfigMap named 'monitoring-config'.

task_completion.description: The agent located the 'prometheus.yml' data field within the ConfigMap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit screen shows a data key or section explicitly named 'prometheus.yml'.

task_completion.description: The agent changed the scrape_interval value to '30s'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor area for 'prometheus.yml' shows the configuration line 'scrape_interval: 30s' (changed from the original 15s).

task_completion.description: The agent saved the updated ConfigMap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save' button, or a success notification/state is visible indicating the ConfigMap was updated successfully.

integrity.description: The agent used the Rancher web UI as instructed, rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Rancher graphical interface, not a terminal window running 'kubectl edit' or similar commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Rancher application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard browser elements, Rancher UI navigation menus, and valid form fields rather than a local text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by executing direct API calls or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, command-line interfaces, or script execution environments are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target ConfigMap is 'monitoring-config' located in the 'monitoring' namespace. The specific data field to edit is 'prometheus.yml'. The original scrape_interval value is '15s', and the expected new value is '30s'.
